# Decisionproof

> Execution governance layer for AI decisions. Spend caps, receipts, and automatic reconciliation for AI runs. Paid private beta.

## Service status

- Paid private beta. Not generally available.
- Pricing: US$29 per 30-day access cycle. PayPal only. No auto-renewal.
- Included: 1,000 decision credits per cycle. Hard cap 2,000 credits per cycle. Per-run cost cap US$5.00. Up to 3 API keys per workspace.
- Operator: D_FFERENT. Contact: ghilplip934@gmail.com.

## Primary public surfaces

- Home: /index.html
- How it works: /how-it-works.html
- Pricing: /pricing.html
- Security & reliability: /security.html
- Quickstart (API docs): /docs/quickstart.html
- Contact & support: /contact.html
- Terms of Use: /terms.html

## API

- Base URL: https://api.decisionproof.io.kr
- Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer dpp_live_{key}` (bearer token, managed from the dashboard, up to 3 keys per workspace)
- Idempotency: `Idempotency-Key` header required on `POST /v1/runs`
- Async pattern: `POST /v1/runs` returns 202 with `run_id`; poll `GET /v1/runs/{run_id}` until `status` is `completed` or `failed`
- Error format: RFC 9457 Problem Details (`application/problem+json`)

See /docs/quickstart.html for the only publicly supported usage examples.

## What this service is not

- No third-party compliance certifications claimed during the paid private beta.
- Not an agent framework or orchestration runtime.
- Not under any uptime SLA during the paid private beta.
- Not available as a free tier.
